local -r z_token="${1:-}"
  local -r z_vessel_dir="${2:-}"
  test -n "${z_token}"      || buc_die "zrbfd_preflight_reliquary: token required"
  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "zrbfd_preflight_reliquary: vessel_dir required"

  local -r z_reliquary="${RBRV_RELIQUARY:-}"
  test -n "${z_reliquary}" || buc_die "RBRV_RELIQUARY required on every ordain-path vessel — yoke a reliquary stamp via tt/${RBZ_YOKE_RELIQUARY}.sh before ordaining"

  buc_step "Verifying reliquary tool images exist in GAR"

  local -r z_canonical_tools=(
    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_GCLOUD}"
    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_DOCKER}"
    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_ALPINE}"
    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SYFT}"
    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_BINFMT}"
    "${RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SKOPEO}"
  )

  local z_missing=()
  local z_tool=""
  local z_pkg=""
  local z_status_file=""
  local z_response_file=""
  local z_stderr_file=""
  local z_http_code=""

  for z_tool in "${z_canonical_tools[@]}"; do
    z_pkg="${RBGL_RELIQUARIES_ROOT}/${z_reliquary}/${z_tool}"
    z_status_file="${ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX}reliquary_${z_tool}_status.txt"
    z_response_file="${ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX}reliquary_${z_tool}_response.txt"
    z_stderr_file="${ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX}reliquary_${z_tool}_stderr.txt"

    curl --head -sS \
      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
      -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
      -w "%{http_code}" \
      -o "${z_response_file}" \
      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_pkg}/manifests/${z_reliquary}" \
      > "${z_status_file}" 2>"${z_stderr_file}" \
      || buc_die "HEAD request failed for reliquary tool: ${z_pkg}:${z_reliquary} — see ${z_stderr_file}"

    z_http_code=$(<"${z_status_file}")
    test -n "${z_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for reliquary check: ${z_tool}"

    case "${z_http_code}" in
      200) buc_log_args "Reliquary tool present: ${z_tool}" ;;
      404) z_missing+=("${z_tool}") ;;
      *)   buc_die "Unexpected HTTP ${z_http_code} when checking reliquary tool: ${z_pkg}:${z_reliquary}" ;;
    esac
  done

  if test "${#z_missing[@]}" -eq 0; then
    buc_info "Reliquary verified: ${z_reliquary} (${#z_canonical_tools[@]}/${#z_canonical_tools[@]} tools present)"
    return 0
  fi

  buc_warn "Reliquary integrity check failed: ${z_reliquary} (${#z_missing[@]}/${#z_canonical_tools[@]} tools missing)"
  buc_bare "  The reliquary is a co-versioned set of builder tool images (gcloud, docker,"
  buc_bare "  syft, alpine, binfmt, skopeo) inscribed from upstream into your private GAR."
  buc_bare "  Air-gapped worker pools cannot pull from the public internet — the reliquary"
  buc_bare "  stages these tools so builds can run without egress. Piecemeal jettison is"
  buc_bare "  allowed but unrecoverable surgically: re-inscribe the whole stamp."
  buc_bare ""
  for z_tool in "${z_missing[@]}"; do
    buc_bare "  PRECHECK: GAR image not found at ${RBGL_RELIQUARIES_ROOT}/${z_reliquary}/${z_tool}"
    buc_bare "    Required by ${RBRV_SIGIL}'s RBRV_RELIQUARY=${z_reliquary}."
  done
  buc_bare ""
  buc_bare "  Recover by re-inscribing the reliquary, then re-yoking and re-ordaining:"
  buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_INSCRIBE_RELIQUARY}"
  buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_YOKE_RELIQUARY}" "<new-stamp>" "${z_vessel_dir}"
  buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "${z_vessel_dir}"
  buc_die "Registry preflight failed — ${#z_missing[@]} of ${#z_canonical_tools[@]} reliquary tool images missing from GAR"
}


# Check concurrent build quota against regime requirements
# Args: token mode
#   mode: "gate" (die if insufficient) or "advisory" (warn if insufficient)
zrbfd_quota_preflight() {
  zrbfd_sentinel

  local -r z_token="${1:-}"

  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "zrbfd_quota_preflight: token required"

  # Extract vCPU count from machine type (last segment after final hyphen)
  local -r z_vcpus="${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE##*-}"
  case "${z_vcpus}" in
    ""|0|*[!0-9]*)
      buc_warn "Cannot parse vCPU count from RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE='${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}' -- skipping quota preflight"
      return 0
      ;;
  esac

  buc_log_args "Machine type ${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE} = ${z_vcpus} vCPUs"

  # Query Service Usage consumer quota API for concurrent_private_pool_build_cpus
  local -r z_metric_encoded="cloudbuild.googleapis.com%2Fconcurrent_private_pool_build_cpus"
  local -r z_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE}${RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/services/cloudbuild.googleapis.com/consumerQuotaMetrics/${z_metric_encoded}"

  buc_step "Checking concurrent build quota"
  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "quota_preflight"

  local z_code=""
  z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "quota_preflight") || z_code=""
  if test "${z_code}" != "200"; then
    buc_warn "Could not query build quota (HTTP ${z_code}) -- skipping preflight check"
    return 0
  fi

  # Filter quota response to region-specific bucket via intermediate file
  rbgu_jq_file_to_file_ok "quota_preflight" "quota_region" \
    "[.consumerQuotaLimits[0].quotaBuckets[] | select(.dimensions.region == \"${RBRR_GCP_REGION}\")] | .[0] // {}" \
    || true

  # Extract effective limit from region bucket, then fallback to first bucket
  local z_limit=""
  z_limit=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "quota_region" '.effectiveLimit') || z_limit=""
  if test -z "${z_limit}"; then
    z_limit=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "quota_preflight" \
      '.consumerQuotaLimits[0].quotaBuckets[0].effectiveLimit') || z_limit=""
  fi

  if test -z "${z_limit}"; then
    buc_warn "Could not extract quota limit -- skipping preflight check"
    return 0
  fi

  # -1 means unlimited
  if test "${z_limit}" = "-1"; then
    buc_info "Quota: unlimited concurrent private pool build CPUs"
    return 0
  fi

  # Compute max concurrent builds
  local -r z_max_concurrent=$((z_limit / z_vcpus))

  buc_log_args "Quota ${z_limit} vCPUs, machine ${z_vcpus} vCPUs, max concurrent ${z_max_concurrent}, required ${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS}"

  if test "${z_max_concurrent}" -lt "${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS}"; then
    buc_warn "Build quota insufficient: ${z_limit} vCPU quota / ${z_vcpus} vCPUs per build = ${z_max_concurrent} concurrent (need ${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS})"
    buc_warn "Fresh depots start with a low quota. After some build activity, the Edit Quotas option becomes available."
    buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_QUOTA_BUILD}"
  else
    buc_info "Quota OK: ${z_limit} vCPU / ${z_vcpus} per build = ${z_max_concurrent} concurrent (need ${RBRR_GCB_MIN_CONCURRENT_BUILDS})"
  fi
}

# Internal: Verify that all required images exist in GAR before submitting
# to Cloud Build. Checks two layers in dependency order:
#
#   1. Reliquary — co-versioned builder tool images (gcloud, docker, syft, etc.)
#      created by inscribe. One reliquary per depot setup. Enshrine depends on it.
#   2. Enshrine — upstream base images copied into private GAR, pinned by content
#      hash. One enshrine per base image anchor. Multiple vessels sharing the same
#      anchor only need one enshrine.
#
# A missing image at either layer causes a Cloud Build failure minutes later.
# This preflight catches it immediately with copy-paste remediation commands.
#
# Must be called after vessel load (reads RBRV_RELIQUARY, RBRV_IMAGE_*_ANCHOR)
# and authentication (needs token for registry API).
zrbfd_registry_preflight() {
  zrbfd_sentinel

  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
  local -r z_vessel_dir="${2:-}"
  test -n "${z_token}"      || buc_die "zrbfd_registry_preflight: token required"
  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "zrbfd_registry_preflight: vessel_dir required"

  # --- Layer 1: Reliquary tool images ---
  zrbfd_preflight_reliquary "${z_token}" "${z_vessel_dir}"

  # --- Layer 2: Enshrined base images ---
  # Each vessel declares base images via RBRV_IMAGE_n_ORIGIN (upstream tag) and
  # RBRV_IMAGE_n_ANCHOR (locator: package-path:tag). Enshrine copies the upstream
  # image into the enshrine namespace, pinned by content hash. The conjure
  # Dockerfile's FROM references the locator-resolved GAR ref, not upstream tag.

  buc_step "Verifying enshrined base images exist in GAR"

  local z_n=""
  local z_anchor_var=""
  local z_anchor=""
  local z_pkg_path=""
  local z_tag=""
  local z_origin_var=""
  local z_origin=""
  local z_any_checked="false"
  local z_status_file=""
  local z_response_file=""
  local z_stderr_file=""
  local z_http_code=""

  for z_n in 1 2 3; do
    z_origin_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_n}_ORIGIN"
    z_anchor_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_n}_ANCHOR"
    z_origin="${!z_origin_var:-}"
    z_anchor="${!z_anchor_var:-}"

    # Skip slots without an origin or without an anchor (pass-through images don't need enshrine)
    test -n "${z_origin}" || continue
    test -n "${z_anchor}" || continue

    case "${z_anchor}" in
      *:*) : ;;
      *)   buc_die "Invalid ${z_anchor_var} locator format (expected package-path:tag): ${z_anchor}" ;;
    esac
    z_pkg_path="${z_anchor%:*}"
    z_tag="${z_anchor##*:}"
    test -n "${z_pkg_path}" || buc_die "Package path is empty in ${z_anchor_var}: ${z_anchor}"
    test -n "${z_tag}"      || buc_die "Tag is empty in ${z_anchor_var}: ${z_anchor}"

    z_any_checked="true"
    z_status_file="${ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX}enshrine_${z_n}_status.txt"
    z_response_file="${ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX}enshrine_${z_n}_response.txt"
    z_stderr_file="${ZRBFD_PREFLIGHT_PREFIX}enshrine_${z_n}_stderr.txt"

    curl --head -sS \
      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}" \
      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}" \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${z_token}" \
      -H "Accept: ${ZRBFC_ACCEPT_MANIFEST_MTYPES}" \
      -w "%{http_code}" \
      -o "${z_response_file}" \
      "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_API_BASE}/${z_pkg_path}/manifests/${z_tag}" \
      > "${z_status_file}" 2>"${z_stderr_file}" \
      || buc_die "HEAD request failed for enshrined image: ${z_anchor} — see ${z_stderr_file}"

    z_http_code=$(<"${z_status_file}")
    test -n "${z_http_code}" || buc_die "HTTP status code is empty for enshrine check"

    if test "${z_http_code}" = "404"; then
      buc_warn "Enshrined base image not found: ${z_anchor} (from ${z_origin})"
      buc_bare "  Enshrine copies upstream base images (e.g., busybox:latest from Docker Hub) into"
      buc_bare "  your private GAR, pinned by content hash. Like the reliquary, this ensures"
      buc_bare "  air-gapped builds never reach the public internet. The anchor locator is stable"
      buc_bare "  until you deliberately re-enshrine to pick up a newer upstream version."
      buc_bare "  Multiple vessels sharing the same base image anchor need only one enshrine."
      buc_bare "  Run enshrine, then re-run ordain:"
      buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ENSHRINE_VESSEL}" "${z_vessel_dir}"
      buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_ORDAIN_HALLMARK}" "${z_vessel_dir}"
      buc_die "Registry preflight failed — enshrined base image missing from GAR"
    elif test "${z_http_code}" != "200"; then
      buc_die "Unexpected HTTP ${z_http_code} when checking enshrined image: ${z_anchor}"
    fi

    buc_log_args "Enshrined image verified: ${z_anchor}"
  done

  if test "${z_any_checked}" = "true"; then
    buc_info "All enshrined base images verified in GAR"
  fi
}

  # Resolve base images: ANCHOR (locator) → full GAR reference, or pass ORIGIN through.

370	zrbfd_stitch_build_json() {
371	  zrbfd_sentinel
372	
373	  local -r z_output_path="${1:?Output path required}"
374	  local -r z_hallmark="${2:?Hallmark required}"
375	  local -r z_context_tag="${3:?Context image tag required}"
376	
377	  buc_log_args "Stitching builds.create JSON to ${z_output_path}"
378	
379	  # Preconditions: vessel loaded and git state captured
380	  test -s "${ZRBFC_VESSEL_SIGIL_FILE}" || buc_die "Vessel not loaded — call zrbfc_load_vessel first"
381	  test -s "${ZRBFC_GIT_INFO_FILE}"     || buc_die "Git info not captured — ensure git metadata is captured before stitch"
382	
383	  buc_log_args 'Read vessel state for substitutions'
384	  local -r z_sigil=$(<"${ZRBFC_VESSEL_SIGIL_FILE}")
385	  test -n "${z_sigil}" || buc_die "Empty vessel sigil"
386	  local -r z_dockerfile_name="${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE##*/}"
387	  local -r z_platforms="${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,}"
388	
389	  # Resolve base images: ANCHOR (locator) → full GAR reference, or pass ORIGIN through.
390	  # Spec: RBSAC step "Resolve Base Images"
391	  # The locator carries its own namespace path (e.g. rbi_es/<anchor>:<anchor>);
392	  # paths within a GAR repo are prefix-free per the wrest/jettison convention.
393	  local -r z_gar_repo_base="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
394	  local z_image_ref_1="" z_image_ref_2="" z_image_ref_3=""
395	  local z_ri_n="" z_ri_origin_var="" z_ri_anchor_var="" z_ri_origin="" z_ri_anchor=""
396	  local z_ri_pkg_path=""
397	  local z_ri_tag=""
398	  for z_ri_n in 1 2 3; do
399	    z_ri_origin_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_ri_n}_ORIGIN"
400	    z_ri_anchor_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_ri_n}_ANCHOR"
401	    z_ri_origin="${!z_ri_origin_var:-}"
402	    z_ri_anchor="${!z_ri_anchor_var:-}"
403	    test -n "${z_ri_origin}" || continue
404	    local z_ri_ref=""
405	    if test -n "${z_ri_anchor}"; then
406	      case "${z_ri_anchor}" in
407	        *:*) : ;;
408	        *)   buc_die "Invalid ${z_ri_anchor_var} locator format (expected package-path:tag): ${z_ri_anchor}" ;;
409	      esac
410	      z_ri_pkg_path="${z_ri_anchor%:*}"
411	      z_ri_tag="${z_ri_anchor##*:}"
412	      test -n "${z_ri_pkg_path}" || buc_die "Package path is empty in ${z_ri_anchor_var}: ${z_ri_anchor}"
413	      test -n "${z_ri_tag}"      || buc_die "Tag is empty in ${z_ri_anchor_var}: ${z_ri_anchor}"
414	      z_ri_ref="${z_gar_repo_base}/${z_ri_pkg_path}:${z_ri_tag}"
415	      buc_log_args "Image slot ${z_ri_n} (anchored): ${z_ri_ref}"
416	    else
417	      z_ri_ref="${z_ri_origin}"
418	      buc_log_args "Image slot ${z_ri_n} (pass-through): ${z_ri_ref}"
419	    fi
420	    case "${z_ri_n}" in
421	      1) z_image_ref_1="${z_ri_ref}" ;; 2) z_image_ref_2="${z_ri_ref}" ;; 3) z_image_ref_3="${z_ri_ref}" ;;
422	    esac
423	  done
424	
425	  # Platform count detection
426	  local z_platform_count=0
427	  local z_remaining_count="${z_platforms}"
428	  local z_p_count=""
429	  while test -n "${z_remaining_count}"; do
430	    z_p_count="${z_remaining_count%%,*}"
431	    z_platform_count=$((z_platform_count + 1))
432	    test "${z_remaining_count}" != "${z_p_count}" || break
433	    z_remaining_count="${z_remaining_count#*,}"
434	  done
435	  buc_log_args "Vessel platforms: ${z_platform_count} (${z_platforms})"
436	
437	  buc_log_args 'Extract git state for substitutions'
438	  local -r z_stitch_git_commit_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}git_commit.txt"
439	  local -r z_stitch_git_branch_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}git_branch.txt"
440	  local -r z_stitch_git_repo_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}git_repo.txt"
441	
442	  jq -r '.commit' "${ZRBFC_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_commit_file}" \
443	    || buc_die "Failed to extract git commit from info file"
444	  jq -r '.branch' "${ZRBFC_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_branch_file}" \
445	    || buc_die "Failed to extract git branch from info file"
446	  jq -r '.repo'   "${ZRBFC_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_repo_file}" \
447	    || buc_die "Failed to extract git repo from info file"
448	
449	  local -r z_git_commit=$(<"${z_stitch_git_commit_file}")
450	  local -r z_git_branch=$(<"${z_stitch_git_branch_file}")
451	  local -r z_git_repo=$(<"${z_stitch_git_repo_file}")
452	
453	  test -n "${z_git_commit}" || buc_die "Git commit is empty"
454	  test -n "${z_git_branch}" || buc_die "Git branch is empty"
455	  test -n "${z_git_repo}"   || buc_die "Git repo is empty"
456	
457	  # Build strategy: compare vessel platforms against runner platform
458	  # If platforms exactly match the runner, no QEMU emulation is needed (native build).
459	  # Any difference (multi-platform or non-native single-platform) requires binfmt.
460	  local z_needs_binfmt="true"
461	  if test "${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,}" = "${RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM}"; then
462	    z_needs_binfmt="false"
463	  fi
464	
465	  local z_build_strategy=""
466	  if test "${z_needs_binfmt}" = "true"; then
467	    z_build_strategy="emulated multi-platform via QEMU (${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,})"
468	    buc_log_args "Build strategy: ${z_build_strategy} — rbgjb02 included"
469	  else
470	    z_build_strategy="native single-platform (${RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM})"
471	    buc_log_args "Build strategy: ${z_build_strategy} — rbgjb02 excluded"
472	  fi
473	
474	  # Step definitions: script|builder|entrypoint|id
475	  # Entrypoint 'bash' → #!/bin/bash shebang, 'sh' → #!/bin/sh shebang (GCB script field)
476	  # Delimiter is | because image refs contain colons (sha256 digests)
477	  # Pipeline: buildx --push → per-platform pullback → SLSA provenance via images: field
478	  local z_step_defs=(
479	    "rbgjb01-derive-tag-base.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_gcloud}|bash|derive-tag-base"
480	  )
481	  if test "${z_needs_binfmt}" = "true"; then
482	    z_step_defs+=("rbgjb02-qemu-binfmt.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|qemu-binfmt")
483	  fi
484	  z_step_defs+=(
485	    "rbgjb03-buildx-push-image.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|buildx-push-image"
486	    "rbgjb04-per-platform-pullback.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|per-platform-pullback"
487	    "rbgjb05-push-per-platform.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|push-per-platform"
488	    "rbgjb06-push-diags.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|push-diags"
489	  )
490	
491	  # Compute platform suffixes (used in images: field and substitutions)
492	  # Always computed: linux/amd64 → -amd64, linux/arm64 → -arm64, linux/arm/v7 → -armv7
493	  local z_platform_suffixes=""
494	  local z_platform_suffixes_csv=""
495	  local z_remaining_plats="${z_platforms}"
496	  local z_plat=""
497	  local z_suffix=""
498	  while test -n "${z_remaining_plats}"; do
499	    z_plat="${z_remaining_plats%%,*}"
500	    # Strip linux/ prefix, collapse remaining slashes: linux/arm/v7 → armv7
501	    z_suffix="${z_plat#linux/}"
502	    z_suffix="${z_suffix//\//}"
503	    z_suffix="-${z_suffix}"
504	    if test -n "${z_platform_suffixes}"; then
505	      z_platform_suffixes="${z_platform_suffixes},${z_suffix}"
506	    else
507	      z_platform_suffixes="${z_suffix}"
508	    fi
509	    test "${z_remaining_plats}" != "${z_plat}" || break
510	    z_remaining_plats="${z_remaining_plats#*,}"
511	  done
512	  z_platform_suffixes_csv="${z_platform_suffixes}"
513	  buc_log_args "Platform suffixes: ${z_platform_suffixes_csv}"
514	
515	  local z_def=""
516	  local z_script=""
517	  local z_builder=""
518	  local z_entrypoint=""
519	  local z_id=""
520	  local z_script_path=""
521	  local z_body=""
522	  local z_shebang=""
523	  local z_body_file=""
524	  local z_escaped_file=""
525	  local z_steps_file=""
526	  local z_accumulator_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}steps.json"
527	
528	  buc_log_args "Initializing empty steps array"
529	  echo "[]" > "${z_accumulator_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize steps JSON"
530	
531	  for z_def in "${z_step_defs[@]}"; do
532	    IFS='|' read -r z_script z_builder z_entrypoint z_id <<< "${z_def}"
533	    z_script_path="${ZRBFD_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR}/${z_script}"
534	    z_body_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_body.txt"
535	    z_escaped_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_escaped.txt"
536	    z_steps_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_steps.json"
537	
538	    test -f "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Step script not found: ${z_script_path}"
539	
540	    buc_log_args "Reading script body for ${z_id} (skip shebang, comments pass through)"
541	    tail -n +2 "${z_script_path}" > "${z_body_file}" || buc_die "Failed to read step script: ${z_script_path}"
542	    z_body=$(<"${z_body_file}")
543	    test -n "${z_body}" || buc_die "Empty script body: ${z_script_path}"
544	
545	    buc_log_args "Baking pinned image refs and build strategy into script text"
546	    z_body="${z_body//\$\{ZRBF_TOOL_BINFMT\}/${z_rbfc_tool_binfmt}}"
547	    z_body="${z_body//\$\{ZRBF_BUILD_STRATEGY\}/${z_build_strategy}}"
548	
549	    case "${z_entrypoint}" in
550	      bash) z_shebang="#!/bin/bash" ;;
551	      sh)   z_shebang="#!/bin/sh" ;;
552	      *)    buc_die "Unknown entrypoint: ${z_entrypoint}" ;;
553	    esac
554	    printf '%s\n%s' "${z_shebang}" "${z_body}" > "${z_escaped_file}" \
555	      || buc_die "Failed to write script body for ${z_id}"
556	
557	    buc_log_args "Appending step ${z_id} to JSON array"
558	    jq \
559	      --arg name "${z_builder}" \
560	      --arg id "${z_id}" \
561	      --arg dir "${z_sigil}" \
562	      --rawfile script "${z_escaped_file}" \
563	      '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, dir: $dir, script: $script}]' \
564	      "${z_accumulator_file}" > "${z_steps_file}" \
565	      || buc_die "Failed to append step ${z_id} to JSON"
566	    mv "${z_steps_file}" "${z_accumulator_file}" \
567	      || buc_die "Failed to update steps JSON for ${z_id}"
568	  done
569	
570	  # === Combined conjure: embed about steps after image steps ===
571	  # About steps use _RBGA_* substitutions delivered via the substitutions block.
572	  # _RBGA_BUILD_ID is the lone exception — Cloud Build job ID, only available
573	  # at runtime as the built-in $BUILD_ID env var; rewritten below.
574	
575	  buc_log_args "Assembling about steps for combined conjure"
576	  local -r z_about_steps_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}about_steps.json"
577	  zrbfc_assemble_about_steps "${z_about_steps_file}" "${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}about_"
578	
579	  # About steps run in vessel dir so .hallmark from rbgjb01 is accessible
580	  buc_log_args "Adding dir field to about steps for vessel directory ${z_sigil}"
581	  local -r z_about_with_dir="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}about_with_dir.json"
582	  jq --arg dir "${z_sigil}" '[.[] | . + {dir: $dir}]' \
583	    "${z_about_steps_file}" > "${z_about_with_dir}" \
584	    || buc_die "Failed to add dir to about steps"
585	
586	  # Build ID: $BUILD_ID → GCB built-in available as env var
587	  buc_log_args "Post-processing about steps: build ID from env"
588	  local -r z_about_processed="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}about_processed.json"
589	  local z_about_content
590	  z_about_content=$(<"${z_about_with_dir}") \
591	    || buc_die "Failed to read about steps for post-processing"
592	  z_about_content="${z_about_content//\$\{_RBGA_BUILD_ID:-\}/\$BUILD_ID}"
593	  printf '%s' "${z_about_content}" > "${z_about_processed}" \
594	    || buc_die "Failed to post-process about steps for conjure"
595	
596	  buc_log_args "Combining image steps and about steps"
597	  local -r z_combined_steps_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}combined_steps.json"
598	  jq -s '.[0] + .[1]' "${z_accumulator_file}" "${z_about_processed}" \
599	    > "${z_combined_steps_file}" || buc_die "Failed to combine image and about steps"
600	  z_accumulator_file="${z_combined_steps_file}"
601	
602	  # Fallback for -diags extraction failure; -diags is the primary path for conjure
603	  buc_log_args "Reading Dockerfile content for _RBGA_DOCKERFILE_CONTENT substitution"
604	  local z_stitch_dockerfile_content=""
605	  local -r z_stitch_df_max_bytes=4000
606	  if test -f "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE:-}"; then
607	    local -r z_stitch_df_size_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}df_size.txt"
608	    wc -c < "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}" > "${z_stitch_df_size_file}" \
609	      || buc_die "Failed to measure Dockerfile size"
610	    local z_stitch_df_size=""
611	    z_stitch_df_size=$(<"${z_stitch_df_size_file}")
612	    z_stitch_df_size="${z_stitch_df_size// /}"
613	    if test "${z_stitch_df_size}" -le "${z_stitch_df_max_bytes}"; then
614	      z_stitch_dockerfile_content=$(<"${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}")
615	    else
616	      buc_warn "Dockerfile exceeds 4KB substitution limit (${z_stitch_df_size} bytes) — recipe.txt via -diags only"
617	    fi
618	  fi
619	
620	  # Compose builds.create Build resource
621	  # All values resolved directly — no placeholders, no post-processing jq surgery.
622	  # Context extraction step prepended; mason SA included; images: field uses inscribe_ts.
623	  buc_log_args "Composing builds.create Build resource"
624	  local -r z_build_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}build.json"
625	  local -r z_mason_sa="projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"
626	
627	  # Context extraction step (first step — extracts build context from pouch in GAR)
628	  local -r z_extract_step_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}extract_step.json"
629	  jq -n \
630	    --arg name "${z_rbfc_tool_docker}" \
631	    --arg ctx_tag "${z_context_tag}" \
632	    --arg sigil "${z_sigil}" \
633	    '{
634	      name: $name,
635	      id: "extract-context",
636	      entrypoint: "/bin/bash",
637	      args: ["-lc", ("set -euo pipefail\necho \"Extracting build context from GAR\"\nCONTAINER=$$(docker create " + $ctx_tag + " /nonexistent)\nmkdir -p /workspace/" + $sigil + "\ndocker cp $${CONTAINER}:/build-context/. /workspace/" + $sigil + "/\ndocker rm $${CONTAINER}\necho \"Context extracted:\"\nls -la /workspace/" + $sigil + "/")]
638	    }' > "${z_extract_step_file}" \
639	    || buc_die "Failed to compose context extraction step"
640	
641	  # Combine: [extract-context] + image steps + about steps
642	  local -r z_all_steps_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}all_steps.json"
643	  jq -s '.[0] + .[1]' <(jq -s '.' "${z_extract_step_file}") "${z_accumulator_file}" \
644	    > "${z_all_steps_file}" || buc_die "Failed to prepend context extraction step"
645	
646	  # images: field — one per-platform attest tag per platform for SLSA provenance via CB images: push
647	  # These are durable provenance-carrying tags on the single attest package
648	  # (rbi_hm/<H>/attest); deleted only by abjure.
649	  local z_images_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}images.json"
650	  local z_attest_pkg="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/attest"
651	  local z_remaining_suffixes="${z_platform_suffixes_csv}"
652	  local z_img_suffix=""
653	  echo "[]" > "${z_images_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize images JSON"
654	  while test -n "${z_remaining_suffixes}"; do
655	    z_img_suffix="${z_remaining_suffixes%%,*}"
656	    jq --arg uri "${z_attest_pkg}:${z_hallmark}${z_img_suffix}" \
657	      '. + [$uri]' "${z_images_file}" > "${z_images_file}.tmp" \
658	      || buc_die "Failed to append image URI"
659	    mv "${z_images_file}.tmp" "${z_images_file}" \
660	      || buc_die "Failed to update images JSON"
661	    test "${z_remaining_suffixes}" != "${z_img_suffix}" || break
662	    z_remaining_suffixes="${z_remaining_suffixes#*,}"
663	  done
664	
665	  # shellcheck disable=SC2016
666	  local -r z_cb_build_id='$BUILD_ID'
667	
668	  # Pool routing: conjure/bind use vessel's egress mode
669	  local z_conjure_pool=""
670	  case "${RBRV_EGRESS_MODE}" in
671	    tether) z_conjure_pool="${RBDC_POOL_TETHER}" ;;
672	    airgap) z_conjure_pool="${RBDC_POOL_AIRGAP}" ;;
673	    *) buc_die "Unknown RBRV_EGRESS_MODE: ${RBRV_EGRESS_MODE}" ;;
674	  esac
675	
676	  jq -n \
677	    --slurpfile zjq_steps  "${z_all_steps_file}" \
678	    --slurpfile zjq_images "${z_images_file}" \
679	    --arg zjq_dockerfile        "${z_dockerfile_name}" \
680	    --arg zjq_vessel            "${z_sigil}" \
681	    --arg zjq_platforms         "${z_platforms}" \
682	    --arg zjq_platform_suffixes "${z_platform_suffixes_csv}" \
683	    --arg zjq_gar_location      "${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}" \
684	    --arg zjq_gar_project       "${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}" \
685	    --arg zjq_gar_repository    "${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}" \
686	    --arg zjq_git_commit        "${z_git_commit}" \
687	    --arg zjq_git_branch        "${z_git_branch}" \
688	    --arg zjq_git_repo          "${z_git_repo}" \
689	    --arg zjq_gar_host_suffix   "${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}" \
690	    --arg zjq_hallmarks_root    "${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}" \
691	    --arg zjq_hallmark          "${z_hallmark}" \
692	    --arg zjq_inscribe_ts       "${z_hallmark%%-r*}" \
693	    --arg zjq_pool              "${z_conjure_pool}" \
694	    --arg zjq_timeout           "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" \
695	    --arg zjq_mason_sa          "${z_mason_sa}" \
696	    --arg zjq_cb_build_id       "${z_cb_build_id}" \
697	    --arg zjq_rbga_gar_host     "${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}" \
698	    --arg zjq_rbga_gar_path     "${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}" \
699	    --arg zjq_rbga_dockerfile   "${z_stitch_dockerfile_content}" \
700	    --arg zjq_image_1           "${z_image_ref_1}" \
701	    --arg zjq_image_2           "${z_image_ref_2}" \
702	    --arg zjq_image_3           "${z_image_ref_3}" \
703	    --arg zjq_basename_image    "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}" \
704	    --arg zjq_basename_about    "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}" \
705	    --arg zjq_basename_attest   "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST}" \
706	    --arg zjq_basename_diags    "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS}" \
707	    '{
708	      steps: [$zjq_steps[0][] |
709	        if .args then
710	          .args = [.args[] | gsub("\\$\\{_RBGA_BUILD_ID\\}"; $zjq_cb_build_id) | gsub("\\$\\{_RBGA_BUILD_ID:-\\}"; $zjq_cb_build_id)]
711	        elif .script then
712	          .script = (.script | gsub("\\$\\{_RBGA_BUILD_ID\\}"; $zjq_cb_build_id) | gsub("\\$\\{_RBGA_BUILD_ID:-\\}"; $zjq_cb_build_id))
713	        else . end],
714	      images: $zjq_images[0],
715	      substitutions: {
716	        _RBGY_DOCKERFILE:          $zjq_dockerfile,
717	        _RBGY_PLATFORMS:           $zjq_platforms,
718	        _RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES:   $zjq_platform_suffixes,
719	        _RBGY_GAR_LOCATION:        $zjq_gar_location,
720	        _RBGY_GAR_PROJECT:         $zjq_gar_project,
721	        _RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY:      $zjq_gar_repository,
722	        _RBGY_GIT_COMMIT:          $zjq_git_commit,
723	        _RBGY_GIT_BRANCH:          $zjq_git_branch,
724	        _RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX:     $zjq_gar_host_suffix,
725	        _RBGY_HALLMARKS_ROOT:      $zjq_hallmarks_root,
726	        _RBGY_HALLMARK:            $zjq_hallmark,
727	        _RBGY_IMAGE_1:             $zjq_image_1,
728	        _RBGY_IMAGE_2:             $zjq_image_2,
729	        _RBGY_IMAGE_3:             $zjq_image_3,
730	        _RBGY_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE:  $zjq_basename_image,
731	        _RBGY_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST: $zjq_basename_attest,
732	        _RBGY_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS:  $zjq_basename_diags,
733	        _RBGA_GAR_HOST:            $zjq_rbga_gar_host,
734	        _RBGA_GAR_PATH:            $zjq_rbga_gar_path,
735	        _RBGA_HALLMARKS_ROOT:      $zjq_hallmarks_root,
736	        _RBGA_HALLMARK:            $zjq_hallmark,
737	        _RBGA_VESSEL:              $zjq_vessel,
738	        _RBGA_VESSEL_MODE:         "conjure",
739	        _RBGA_GIT_COMMIT:          $zjq_git_commit,
740	        _RBGA_GIT_BRANCH:          $zjq_git_branch,
741	        _RBGA_GIT_REPO:            $zjq_git_repo,
742	        _RBGA_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP:  $zjq_inscribe_ts,
743	        _RBGA_BIND_SOURCE:         "",
744	        _RBGA_GRAFT_SOURCE:        "",
745	        _RBGA_DOCKERFILE_CONTENT:  $zjq_rbga_dockerfile,
746	        _RBGA_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE:  $zjq_basename_image,
747	        _RBGA_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT:  $zjq_basename_about,
748	        _RBGA_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS:  $zjq_basename_diags
749	      },
750	      serviceAccount: $zjq_mason_sa,
751	      options: {
752	        requestedVerifyOption: "VERIFIED",
753	        automapSubstitutions: true,
754	        logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY",
755	        pool: { name: $zjq_pool }
756	      },
757	      timeout: $zjq_timeout
758	    }' > "${z_build_file}" \
759	    || buc_die "Failed to compose build JSON"
760	
761	  mv "${z_build_file}" "${z_output_path}" \
762	    || buc_die "Failed to write final build JSON to ${z_output_path}"
763	
764	  buc_log_args "Stitched ${#z_step_defs[@]} + context + about steps to ${z_output_path}"
765	}
766	
767	
768	
769	# Push vessel build context to GAR as a FROM SCRATCH OCI image (the pouch).
770	# The pouch carries the Dockerfile and supporting files that GCB
771	# needs in /workspace during the build.
772	#
773	# Args: token  sigil  build_context_path  hallmark
774	# Side-effect: writes context image tag to ${ZRBFD_CONTEXT_PREFIX}tag.txt
775	zrbfd_push_build_context() {
776	  zrbfd_sentinel
777	
778	  local -r z_token="$1"
779	  local -r z_sigil="$2"
780	  local -r z_bldctx="$3"
781	  local -r z_hallmark="$4"
782	
783	  test -d "${z_bldctx}" || buc_die "Build context directory not found: ${z_bldctx}"
784	  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Hallmark required for pouch tag"
785	
786	  local -r z_gar_host="${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_HOST}"
787	  local -r z_context_tag_file="${ZRBFD_CONTEXT_PREFIX}tag.txt"
788	  local -r z_context_dockerfile="${ZRBFD_CONTEXT_PREFIX}Dockerfile"
789	
790	  local -r z_context_tag="${z_gar_host}/${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_PATH}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/pouch:${z_hallmark}"
791	
792	  # Build FROM SCRATCH image containing build context
793	  buc_step "Building context image for ${z_sigil}"
794	  printf 'FROM scratch\nCOPY . /build-context/\n' > "${z_context_dockerfile}" \
795	    || buc_die "Failed to write context Dockerfile"
796	
797	  docker build --platform "${RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM}" -f "${z_context_dockerfile}" -t "${z_context_tag}" "${z_bldctx}" \
798	    || buc_die "Failed to build context image"
799	
800	  # Push to GAR
801	  buc_step "Pushing context image to GAR"
802	  echo "${z_token}" | docker login -u oauth2accesstoken --password-stdin "https://${z_gar_host}" \
803	    || buc_die "GAR authentication failed for context push"
804	
805	  docker push "${z_context_tag}" \
806	    || buc_die "Failed to push context image to GAR"
807	
808	  echo "${z_context_tag}" > "${z_context_tag_file}" \
809	    || buc_die "Failed to persist context image tag"
810	
811	  buc_info "Context image pushed: ${z_context_tag}"
812	}
813	
814	
815	######################################################################
816	# External Functions (rbfd_*)
817	
818	rbfd_enshrine() {
819	  zrbfd_sentinel

file.content:
zrbfd_stitch_build_json() {
  zrbfd_sentinel

  local -r z_output_path="${1:?Output path required}"
  local -r z_hallmark="${2:?Hallmark required}"
  local -r z_context_tag="${3:?Context image tag required}"

  buc_log_args "Stitching builds.create JSON to ${z_output_path}"

  # Preconditions: vessel loaded and git state captured
  test -s "${ZRBFC_VESSEL_SIGIL_FILE}" || buc_die "Vessel not loaded — call zrbfc_load_vessel first"
  test -s "${ZRBFC_GIT_INFO_FILE}"     || buc_die "Git info not captured — ensure git metadata is captured before stitch"

  buc_log_args 'Read vessel state for substitutions'
  local -r z_sigil=$(<"${ZRBFC_VESSEL_SIGIL_FILE}")
  test -n "${z_sigil}" || buc_die "Empty vessel sigil"
  local -r z_dockerfile_name="${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE##*/}"
  local -r z_platforms="${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,}"

  # Resolve base images: ANCHOR (locator) → full GAR reference, or pass ORIGIN through.
  # Spec: RBSAC step "Resolve Base Images"
  # The locator carries its own namespace path (e.g. rbi_es/<anchor>:<anchor>);
  # paths within a GAR repo are prefix-free per the wrest/jettison convention.
  local -r z_gar_repo_base="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
  local z_image_ref_1="" z_image_ref_2="" z_image_ref_3=""
  local z_ri_n="" z_ri_origin_var="" z_ri_anchor_var="" z_ri_origin="" z_ri_anchor=""
  local z_ri_pkg_path=""
  local z_ri_tag=""
  for z_ri_n in 1 2 3; do
    z_ri_origin_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_ri_n}_ORIGIN"
    z_ri_anchor_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_ri_n}_ANCHOR"
    z_ri_origin="${!z_ri_origin_var:-}"
    z_ri_anchor="${!z_ri_anchor_var:-}"
    test -n "${z_ri_origin}" || continue
    local z_ri_ref=""
    if test -n "${z_ri_anchor}"; then
      case "${z_ri_anchor}" in
        *:*) : ;;
        *)   buc_die "Invalid ${z_ri_anchor_var} locator format (expected package-path:tag): ${z_ri_anchor}" ;;
      esac
      z_ri_pkg_path="${z_ri_anchor%:*}"
      z_ri_tag="${z_ri_anchor##*:}"
      test -n "${z_ri_pkg_path}" || buc_die "Package path is empty in ${z_ri_anchor_var}: ${z_ri_anchor}"
      test -n "${z_ri_tag}"      || buc_die "Tag is empty in ${z_ri_anchor_var}: ${z_ri_anchor}"
      z_ri_ref="${z_gar_repo_base}/${z_ri_pkg_path}:${z_ri_tag}"
      buc_log_args "Image slot ${z_ri_n} (anchored): ${z_ri_ref}"
    else
      z_ri_ref="${z_ri_origin}"
      buc_log_args "Image slot ${z_ri_n} (pass-through): ${z_ri_ref}"
    fi
    case "${z_ri_n}" in
      1) z_image_ref_1="${z_ri_ref}" ;; 2) z_image_ref_2="${z_ri_ref}" ;; 3) z_image_ref_3="${z_ri_ref}" ;;
    esac
  done

  # Platform count detection
  local z_platform_count=0
  local z_remaining_count="${z_platforms}"
  local z_p_count=""
  while test -n "${z_remaining_count}"; do
    z_p_count="${z_remaining_count%%,*}"
    z_platform_count=$((z_platform_count + 1))
    test "${z_remaining_count}" != "${z_p_count}" || break
    z_remaining_count="${z_remaining_count#*,}"
  done
  buc_log_args "Vessel platforms: ${z_platform_count} (${z_platforms})"

  buc_log_args 'Extract git state for substitutions'
  local -r z_stitch_git_commit_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}git_commit.txt"
  local -r z_stitch_git_branch_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}git_branch.txt"
  local -r z_stitch_git_repo_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}git_repo.txt"

  jq -r '.commit' "${ZRBFC_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_commit_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to extract git commit from info file"
  jq -r '.branch' "${ZRBFC_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_branch_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to extract git branch from info file"
  jq -r '.repo'   "${ZRBFC_GIT_INFO_FILE}" > "${z_stitch_git_repo_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to extract git repo from info file"

  local -r z_git_commit=$(<"${z_stitch_git_commit_file}")
  local -r z_git_branch=$(<"${z_stitch_git_branch_file}")
  local -r z_git_repo=$(<"${z_stitch_git_repo_file}")

  test -n "${z_git_commit}" || buc_die "Git commit is empty"
  test -n "${z_git_branch}" || buc_die "Git branch is empty"
  test -n "${z_git_repo}"   || buc_die "Git repo is empty"

  # Build strategy: compare vessel platforms against runner platform
  # If platforms exactly match the runner, no QEMU emulation is needed (native build).
  # Any difference (multi-platform or non-native single-platform) requires binfmt.
  local z_needs_binfmt="true"
  if test "${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,}" = "${RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM}"; then
    z_needs_binfmt="false"
  fi

  local z_build_strategy=""
  if test "${z_needs_binfmt}" = "true"; then
    z_build_strategy="emulated multi-platform via QEMU (${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS// /,})"
    buc_log_args "Build strategy: ${z_build_strategy} — rbgjb02 included"
  else
    z_build_strategy="native single-platform (${RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM})"
    buc_log_args "Build strategy: ${z_build_strategy} — rbgjb02 excluded"
  fi

  # Step definitions: script|builder|entrypoint|id
  # Entrypoint 'bash' → #!/bin/bash shebang, 'sh' → #!/bin/sh shebang (GCB script field)
  # Delimiter is | because image refs contain colons (sha256 digests)
  # Pipeline: buildx --push → per-platform pullback → SLSA provenance via images: field
  local z_step_defs=(
    "rbgjb01-derive-tag-base.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_gcloud}|bash|derive-tag-base"
  )
  if test "${z_needs_binfmt}" = "true"; then
    z_step_defs+=("rbgjb02-qemu-binfmt.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|qemu-binfmt")
  fi
  z_step_defs+=(
    "rbgjb03-buildx-push-image.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|buildx-push-image"
    "rbgjb04-per-platform-pullback.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|per-platform-pullback"
    "rbgjb05-push-per-platform.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|push-per-platform"
    "rbgjb06-push-diags.sh|${z_rbfc_tool_docker}|bash|push-diags"
  )

  # Compute platform suffixes (used in images: field and substitutions)
  # Always computed: linux/amd64 → -amd64, linux/arm64 → -arm64, linux/arm/v7 → -armv7
  local z_platform_suffixes=""
  local z_platform_suffixes_csv=""
  local z_remaining_plats="${z_platforms}"
  local z_plat=""
  local z_suffix=""
  while test -n "${z_remaining_plats}"; do
    z_plat="${z_remaining_plats%%,*}"
    # Strip linux/ prefix, collapse remaining slashes: linux/arm/v7 → armv7
    z_suffix="${z_plat#linux/}"
    z_suffix="${z_suffix//\//}"
    z_suffix="-${z_suffix}"
    if test -n "${z_platform_suffixes}"; then
      z_platform_suffixes="${z_platform_suffixes},${z_suffix}"
    else
      z_platform_suffixes="${z_suffix}"
    fi
    test "${z_remaining_plats}" != "${z_plat}" || break
    z_remaining_plats="${z_remaining_plats#*,}"
  done
  z_platform_suffixes_csv="${z_platform_suffixes}"
  buc_log_args "Platform suffixes: ${z_platform_suffixes_csv}"

  local z_def=""
  local z_script=""
  local z_builder=""
  local z_entrypoint=""
  local z_id=""
  local z_script_path=""
  local z_body=""
  local z_shebang=""
  local z_body_file=""
  local z_escaped_file=""
  local z_steps_file=""
  local z_accumulator_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}steps.json"

  buc_log_args "Initializing empty steps array"
  echo "[]" > "${z_accumulator_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize steps JSON"

  for z_def in "${z_step_defs[@]}"; do
    IFS='|' read -r z_script z_builder z_entrypoint z_id <<< "${z_def}"
    z_script_path="${ZRBFD_RBGJB_STEPS_DIR}/${z_script}"
    z_body_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_body.txt"
    z_escaped_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_escaped.txt"
    z_steps_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}${z_id}_steps.json"

    test -f "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Step script not found: ${z_script_path}"

    buc_log_args "Reading script body for ${z_id} (skip shebang, comments pass through)"
    tail -n +2 "${z_script_path}" > "${z_body_file}" || buc_die "Failed to read step script: ${z_script_path}"
    z_body=$(<"${z_body_file}")
    test -n "${z_body}" || buc_die "Empty script body: ${z_script_path}"

    buc_log_args "Baking pinned image refs and build strategy into script text"
    z_body="${z_body//\$\{ZRBF_TOOL_BINFMT\}/${z_rbfc_tool_binfmt}}"
    z_body="${z_body//\$\{ZRBF_BUILD_STRATEGY\}/${z_build_strategy}}"

    case "${z_entrypoint}" in
      bash) z_shebang="#!/bin/bash" ;;
      sh)   z_shebang="#!/bin/sh" ;;
      *)    buc_die "Unknown entrypoint: ${z_entrypoint}" ;;
    esac
    printf '%s\n%s' "${z_shebang}" "${z_body}" > "${z_escaped_file}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to write script body for ${z_id}"

    buc_log_args "Appending step ${z_id} to JSON array"
    jq \
      --arg name "${z_builder}" \
      --arg id "${z_id}" \
      --arg dir "${z_sigil}" \
      --rawfile script "${z_escaped_file}" \
      '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, dir: $dir, script: $script}]' \
      "${z_accumulator_file}" > "${z_steps_file}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to append step ${z_id} to JSON"
    mv "${z_steps_file}" "${z_accumulator_file}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to update steps JSON for ${z_id}"
  done

  # === Combined conjure: embed about steps after image steps ===
  # About steps use _RBGA_* substitutions delivered via the substitutions block.
  # _RBGA_BUILD_ID is the lone exception — Cloud Build job ID, only available
  # at runtime as the built-in $BUILD_ID env var; rewritten below.

  buc_log_args "Assembling about steps for combined conjure"
  local -r z_about_steps_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}about_steps.json"
  zrbfc_assemble_about_steps "${z_about_steps_file}" "${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}about_"

  # About steps run in vessel dir so .hallmark from rbgjb01 is accessible
  buc_log_args "Adding dir field to about steps for vessel directory ${z_sigil}"
  local -r z_about_with_dir="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}about_with_dir.json"
  jq --arg dir "${z_sigil}" '[.[] | . + {dir: $dir}]' \
    "${z_about_steps_file}" > "${z_about_with_dir}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to add dir to about steps"

  # Build ID: $BUILD_ID → GCB built-in available as env var
  buc_log_args "Post-processing about steps: build ID from env"
  local -r z_about_processed="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}about_processed.json"
  local z_about_content
  z_about_content=$(<"${z_about_with_dir}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to read about steps for post-processing"
  z_about_content="${z_about_content//\$\{_RBGA_BUILD_ID:-\}/\$BUILD_ID}"
  printf '%s' "${z_about_content}" > "${z_about_processed}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to post-process about steps for conjure"

  buc_log_args "Combining image steps and about steps"
  local -r z_combined_steps_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}combined_steps.json"
  jq -s '.[0] + .[1]' "${z_accumulator_file}" "${z_about_processed}" \
    > "${z_combined_steps_file}" || buc_die "Failed to combine image and about steps"
  z_accumulator_file="${z_combined_steps_file}"

  # Fallback for -diags extraction failure; -diags is the primary path for conjure
  buc_log_args "Reading Dockerfile content for _RBGA_DOCKERFILE_CONTENT substitution"
  local z_stitch_dockerfile_content=""
  local -r z_stitch_df_max_bytes=4000
  if test -f "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE:-}"; then
    local -r z_stitch_df_size_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}df_size.txt"
    wc -c < "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}" > "${z_stitch_df_size_file}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to measure Dockerfile size"
    local z_stitch_df_size=""
    z_stitch_df_size=$(<"${z_stitch_df_size_file}")
    z_stitch_df_size="${z_stitch_df_size// /}"
    if test "${z_stitch_df_size}" -le "${z_stitch_df_max_bytes}"; then
      z_stitch_dockerfile_content=$(<"${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}")
    else
      buc_warn "Dockerfile exceeds 4KB substitution limit (${z_stitch_df_size} bytes) — recipe.txt via -diags only"
    fi
  fi

  # Compose builds.create Build resource
  # All values resolved directly — no placeholders, no post-processing jq surgery.
  # Context extraction step prepended; mason SA included; images: field uses inscribe_ts.
  buc_log_args "Composing builds.create Build resource"
  local -r z_build_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}build.json"
  local -r z_mason_sa="projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"

  # Context extraction step (first step — extracts build context from pouch in GAR)
  local -r z_extract_step_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}extract_step.json"
  jq -n \
    --arg name "${z_rbfc_tool_docker}" \
    --arg ctx_tag "${z_context_tag}" \
    --arg sigil "${z_sigil}" \
    '{
      name: $name,
      id: "extract-context",
      entrypoint: "/bin/bash",
      args: ["-lc", ("set -euo pipefail\necho \"Extracting build context from GAR\"\nCONTAINER=$$(docker create " + $ctx_tag + " /nonexistent)\nmkdir -p /workspace/" + $sigil + "\ndocker cp $${CONTAINER}:/build-context/. /workspace/" + $sigil + "/\ndocker rm $${CONTAINER}\necho \"Context extracted:\"\nls -la /workspace/" + $sigil + "/")]
    }' > "${z_extract_step_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to compose context extraction step"

  # Combine: [extract-context] + image steps + about steps
  local -r z_all_steps_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}all_steps.json"
  jq -s '.[0] + .[1]' <(jq -s '.' "${z_extract_step_file}") "${z_accumulator_file}" \
    > "${z_all_steps_file}" || buc_die "Failed to prepend context extraction step"

  # images: field — one per-platform attest tag per platform for SLSA provenance via CB images: push
  # These are durable provenance-carrying tags on the single attest package
  # (rbi_hm/<H>/attest); deleted only by abjure.
  local z_images_file="${ZRBFD_STITCH_PREFIX}images.json"
  local z_attest_pkg="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}/${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/attest"
  local z_remaining_suffixes="${z_platform_suffixes_csv}"
  local z_img_suffix=""
  echo "[]" > "${z_images_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize images JSON"
  while test -n "${z_remaining_suffixes}"; do
    z_img_suffix="${z_remaining_suffixes%%,*}"
    jq --arg uri "${z_attest_pkg}:${z_hallmark}${z_img_suffix}" \
      '. + [$uri]' "${z_images_file}" > "${z_images_file}.tmp" \
      || buc_die "Failed to append image URI"
    mv "${z_images_file}.tmp" "${z_images_file}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to update images JSON"
    test "${z_remaining_suffixes}" != "${z_img_suffix}" || break
    z_remaining_suffixes="${z_remaining_suffixes#*,}"
  done

  # shellcheck disable=SC2016
  local -r z_cb_build_id='$BUILD_ID'

  # Pool routing: conjure/bind use vessel's egress mode
  local z_conjure_pool=""
  case "${RBRV_EGRESS_MODE}" in
    tether) z_conjure_pool="${RBDC_POOL_TETHER}" ;;
    airgap) z_conjure_pool="${RBDC_POOL_AIRGAP}" ;;
    *) buc_die "Unknown RBRV_EGRESS_MODE: ${RBRV_EGRESS_MODE}" ;;
  esac

  jq -n \
    --slurpfile zjq_steps  "${z_all_steps_file}" \
    --slurpfile zjq_images "${z_images_file}" \
    --arg zjq_dockerfile        "${z_dockerfile_name}" \
    --arg zjq_vessel            "${z_sigil}" \
    --arg zjq_platforms         "${z_platforms}" \
    --arg zjq_platform_suffixes "${z_platform_suffixes_csv}" \
    --arg zjq_gar_location      "${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}" \
    --arg zjq_gar_project       "${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}" \
    --arg zjq_gar_repository    "${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}" \
    --arg zjq_git_commit        "${z_git_commit}" \
    --arg zjq_git_branch        "${z_git_branch}" \
    --arg zjq_git_repo          "${z_git_repo}" \
    --arg zjq_gar_host_suffix   "${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}" \
    --arg zjq_hallmarks_root    "${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}" \
    --arg zjq_hallmark          "${z_hallmark}" \
    --arg zjq_inscribe_ts       "${z_hallmark%%-r*}" \
    --arg zjq_pool              "${z_conjure_pool}" \
    --arg zjq_timeout           "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" \
    --arg zjq_mason_sa          "${z_mason_sa}" \
    --arg zjq_cb_build_id       "${z_cb_build_id}" \
    --arg zjq_rbga_gar_host     "${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}" \
    --arg zjq_rbga_gar_path     "${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}" \
    --arg zjq_rbga_dockerfile   "${z_stitch_dockerfile_content}" \
    --arg zjq_image_1           "${z_image_ref_1}" \
    --arg zjq_image_2           "${z_image_ref_2}" \
    --arg zjq_image_3           "${z_image_ref_3}" \
    --arg zjq_basename_image    "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}" \
    --arg zjq_basename_about    "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT}" \
    --arg zjq_basename_attest   "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST}" \
    --arg zjq_basename_diags    "${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS}" \
    '{
      steps: [$zjq_steps[0][] |
        if .args then
          .args = [.args[] | gsub("\\$\\{_RBGA_BUILD_ID\\}"; $zjq_cb_build_id) | gsub("\\$\\{_RBGA_BUILD_ID:-\\}"; $zjq_cb_build_id)]
        elif .script then
          .script = (.script | gsub("\\$\\{_RBGA_BUILD_ID\\}"; $zjq_cb_build_id) | gsub("\\$\\{_RBGA_BUILD_ID:-\\}"; $zjq_cb_build_id))
        else . end],
      images: $zjq_images[0],
      substitutions: {
        _RBGY_DOCKERFILE:          $zjq_dockerfile,
        _RBGY_PLATFORMS:           $zjq_platforms,
        _RBGY_PLATFORM_SUFFIXES:   $zjq_platform_suffixes,
        _RBGY_GAR_LOCATION:        $zjq_gar_location,
        _RBGY_GAR_PROJECT:         $zjq_gar_project,
        _RBGY_GAR_REPOSITORY:      $zjq_gar_repository,
        _RBGY_GIT_COMMIT:          $zjq_git_commit,
        _RBGY_GIT_BRANCH:          $zjq_git_branch,
        _RBGY_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX:     $zjq_gar_host_suffix,
        _RBGY_HALLMARKS_ROOT:      $zjq_hallmarks_root,
        _RBGY_HALLMARK:            $zjq_hallmark,
        _RBGY_IMAGE_1:             $zjq_image_1,
        _RBGY_IMAGE_2:             $zjq_image_2,
        _RBGY_IMAGE_3:             $zjq_image_3,
        _RBGY_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE:  $zjq_basename_image,
        _RBGY_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST: $zjq_basename_attest,
        _RBGY_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS:  $zjq_basename_diags,
        _RBGA_GAR_HOST:            $zjq_rbga_gar_host,
        _RBGA_GAR_PATH:            $zjq_rbga_gar_path,
        _RBGA_HALLMARKS_ROOT:      $zjq_hallmarks_root,
        _RBGA_HALLMARK:            $zjq_hallmark,
        _RBGA_VESSEL:              $zjq_vessel,
        _RBGA_VESSEL_MODE:         "conjure",
        _RBGA_GIT_COMMIT:          $zjq_git_commit,
        _RBGA_GIT_BRANCH:          $zjq_git_branch,
        _RBGA_GIT_REPO:            $zjq_git_repo,
        _RBGA_INSCRIBE_TIMESTAMP:  $zjq_inscribe_ts,
        _RBGA_BIND_SOURCE:         "",
        _RBGA_GRAFT_SOURCE:        "",
        _RBGA_DOCKERFILE_CONTENT:  $zjq_rbga_dockerfile,
        _RBGA_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE:  $zjq_basename_image,
        _RBGA_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT:  $zjq_basename_about,
        _RBGA_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS:  $zjq_basename_diags
      },
      serviceAccount: $zjq_mason_sa,
      options: {
        requestedVerifyOption: "VERIFIED",
        automapSubstitutions: true,
        logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY",
        pool: { name: $zjq_pool }
      },
      timeout: $zjq_timeout
    }' > "${z_build_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to compose build JSON"

  mv "${z_build_file}" "${z_output_path}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to write final build JSON to ${z_output_path}"

  buc_log_args "Stitched ${#z_step_defs[@]} + context + about steps to ${z_output_path}"
}



# Push vessel build context to GAR as a FROM SCRATCH OCI image (the pouch).
# The pouch carries the Dockerfile and supporting files that GCB
# needs in /workspace during the build.
#
# Args: token  sigil  build_context_path  hallmark
# Side-effect: writes context image tag to ${ZRBFD_CONTEXT_PREFIX}tag.txt
zrbfd_push_build_context() {
  zrbfd_sentinel

  local -r z_token="$1"
  local -r z_sigil="$2"
  local -r z_bldctx="$3"
  local -r z_hallmark="$4"

  test -d "${z_bldctx}" || buc_die "Build context directory not found: ${z_bldctx}"
  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Hallmark required for pouch tag"

  local -r z_gar_host="${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_HOST}"
  local -r z_context_tag_file="${ZRBFD_CONTEXT_PREFIX}tag.txt"
  local -r z_context_dockerfile="${ZRBFD_CONTEXT_PREFIX}Dockerfile"

  local -r z_context_tag="${z_gar_host}/${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_PATH}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/pouch:${z_hallmark}"

  # Build FROM SCRATCH image containing build context
  buc_step "Building context image for ${z_sigil}"
  printf 'FROM scratch\nCOPY . /build-context/\n' > "${z_context_dockerfile}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to write context Dockerfile"

  docker build --platform "${RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM}" -f "${z_context_dockerfile}" -t "${z_context_tag}" "${z_bldctx}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to build context image"

  # Push to GAR
  buc_step "Pushing context image to GAR"
  echo "${z_token}" | docker login -u oauth2accesstoken --password-stdin "https://${z_gar_host}" \
    || buc_die "GAR authentication failed for context push"

  docker push "${z_context_tag}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to push context image to GAR"

  echo "${z_context_tag}" > "${z_context_tag_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to persist context image tag"

  buc_info "Context image pushed: ${z_context_tag}"
}

zrbfd_enshrine_submit() {
  zrbfd_sentinel

  local -r z_token="$1"

  buc_step "Constructing enshrine Cloud Build resource"
  local -r z_gar_host="${RBGD_GAR_LOCATION}${RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX}"
  local -r z_gar_path="${RBGD_GAR_PROJECT_ID}/${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
  local -r z_mason_sa="projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${RBGD_MASON_EMAIL}"

  # Assemble enshrine step from script
  local -r z_script_path="${ZRBFD_RBGJE_STEPS_DIR}/rbgje01-enshrine-copy.sh"
  test -f "${z_script_path}" || buc_die "Enshrine step script not found: ${z_script_path}"

  local -r z_body_file="${ZRBFD_ENSHRINE_PREFIX}body.txt"
  local -r z_escaped_file="${ZRBFD_ENSHRINE_PREFIX}escaped.txt"

  buc_log_args "Reading enshrine step script (skip shebang)"
  tail -n +2 "${z_script_path}" > "${z_body_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to read enshrine step script"
  local z_body=""
  z_body=$(<"${z_body_file}")
  test -n "${z_body}" || buc_die "Empty enshrine script body"

  printf '#!/bin/bash\n%s' "${z_body}" > "${z_escaped_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to write escaped enshrine script body"

  local -r z_step_file="${ZRBFD_ENSHRINE_PREFIX}step.json"
  echo "[]" > "${z_step_file}" || buc_die "Failed to initialize enshrine step JSON"

  local -r z_step_built="${ZRBFD_ENSHRINE_PREFIX}step_built.json"
  jq \
    --arg name "${z_rbfc_tool_skopeo}" \
    --arg id "enshrine-copy" \
    --rawfile script "${z_escaped_file}" \
    '. + [{name: $name, id: $id, script: $script}]' \
    "${z_step_file}" > "${z_step_built}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to build enshrine step JSON"
  mv "${z_step_built}" "${z_step_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to finalize enshrine step JSON"

  # Compose Build resource JSON
  buc_log_args "Composing enshrine Build resource JSON"
  local -r z_build_file="${ZRBFD_ENSHRINE_PREFIX}build.json"

  # ORIGIN substitution per slot: pass non-empty ORIGIN through verbatim; empty
  # slots become empty substitutions so the CB step's `test -n "${ORIGIN}"
  # || continue` guard skips them.
  local -r z_sub_origin_1="${RBRV_IMAGE_1_ORIGIN:-}"
  local -r z_sub_origin_2="${RBRV_IMAGE_2_ORIGIN:-}"
  local -r z_sub_origin_3="${RBRV_IMAGE_3_ORIGIN:-}"

  jq -n \
    --slurpfile zjq_steps        "${z_step_file}" \
    --arg zjq_sa                 "${z_mason_sa}" \
    --arg zjq_gar_host           "${z_gar_host}" \
    --arg zjq_gar_path           "${z_gar_path}" \
    --arg zjq_enshrines_root     "${RBGL_ENSHRINES_ROOT}" \
    --arg zjq_enshrines_category "${RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_ENSHRINES}" \
    --arg zjq_origin_1           "${z_sub_origin_1}" \
    --arg zjq_origin_2           "${z_sub_origin_2}" \
    --arg zjq_origin_3           "${z_sub_origin_3}" \
    --arg zjq_pool               "${RBDC_POOL_TETHER}" \
    --arg zjq_timeout            "${RBRR_GCB_TIMEOUT}" \
    '{
      steps: $zjq_steps[0],
      substitutions: {
        _RBGE_GAR_HOST:           $zjq_gar_host,
        _RBGE_GAR_PATH:           $zjq_gar_path,
        _RBGE_ENSHRINES_ROOT:     $zjq_enshrines_root,
        _RBGE_ENSHRINES_CATEGORY: $zjq_enshrines_category,
        _RBGE_IMAGE_1_ORIGIN:     $zjq_origin_1,
        _RBGE_IMAGE_2_ORIGIN:     $zjq_origin_2,
        _RBGE_IMAGE_3_ORIGIN:     $zjq_origin_3
      },
      serviceAccount: $zjq_sa,
      options: {
        automapSubstitutions: true,
        logging: "CLOUD_LOGGING_ONLY",
        pool: { name: $zjq_pool }
      },
      timeout: $zjq_timeout
    }' > "${z_build_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to compose enshrine build JSON"

  buc_log_args "Enshrine build JSON: ${z_build_file}"

  buc_step "Submitting enshrine Cloud Build"
  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${ZRBFC_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}" "${z_token}" \
    "enshrine_build_create" "${z_build_file}"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "Enshrine build submission" "enshrine_build_create"

  local z_build_id=""
  z_build_id=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "enshrine_build_create" '.metadata.build.id') || z_build_id=""
  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID not found in builds.create response"
  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBFC_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build ID"

  local -r z_console_url="${ZRBFC_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
  buc_info "Enshrine build submitted: ${z_build_id}"
  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"

  zrbfc_wait_build_completion 50 "Enshrine"  # ~4 minutes at 5s intervals
}

# Internal: Extract anchor results from completed enshrine build and write to vessel regime
# Reads buildStepOutputs from the build status response (populated by /builder/outputs/output)
zrbfd_enshrine_extract_anchors() {
  zrbfd_sentinel

  local -r z_rbrv_file="$1"
  test -f "${z_rbrv_file}" || buc_die "Vessel regime file not found: ${z_rbrv_file}"

  buc_step "Extracting anchor results from build step outputs"

  # buildStepOutputs[0] is base64-encoded JSON from the enshrine step
  local -r z_b64_file="${ZRBFD_ENSHRINE_PREFIX}output_b64.txt"
  local -r z_output_file="${ZRBFD_ENSHRINE_PREFIX}output.json"

  jq -r '.results.buildStepOutputs[0] // empty' "${ZRBFC_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" \
    > "${z_b64_file}" || buc_die "Failed to extract buildStepOutputs from build result"
  test -s "${z_b64_file}" || buc_die "No buildStepOutputs in build result — enshrine step did not produce output"

  openssl enc -base64 -d -A < "${z_b64_file}" > "${z_output_file}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to decode buildStepOutputs base64"
  test -s "${z_output_file}" || buc_die "Empty decoded buildStepOutputs"

  buc_log_args "Enshrine output:"
  buc_log_pipe < "${z_output_file}"

  # Write each anchor back to the vessel regime file
  local z_n=""
  local z_slot_key=""
  local z_anchor=""
  local z_anchor_var=""
  local z_anchor_line=""
  local z_updated_file=""

  for z_n in 1 2 3; do
    z_slot_key="slot_${z_n}"
    z_anchor=$(jq -r ".${z_slot_key}.anchor // empty" "${z_output_file}") || z_anchor=""
    test -n "${z_anchor}" || continue

    z_anchor_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_n}_ANCHOR"
    z_anchor_line="${z_anchor_var}=${z_anchor}"
    z_updated_file="${ZRBFD_ENSHRINE_PREFIX}${z_n}_updated_rbrv.env"

    buc_step "Writing anchor slot ${z_n}: ${z_anchor}"

    # Replace existing ANCHOR line or append — bash-native read/match/write
    local z_found=false
    while IFS= read -r z_line; do
      if [[ "${z_line}" == ${z_anchor_var}=* ]]; then
        printf '%s\n' "${z_anchor_line}"
        z_found=true
      else
        printf '%s\n' "${z_line}"
      fi
    done < "${z_rbrv_file}" > "${z_updated_file}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to process ${z_rbrv_file} for ${z_anchor_var}"

    if [[ "${z_found}" != "true" ]]; then
      printf '%s\n' "${z_anchor_line}" >> "${z_updated_file}" \
        || buc_die "Failed to append ${z_anchor_var}"
    fi

    cp "${z_updated_file}" "${z_rbrv_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write updated rbrv.env"

    buc_success "Slot ${z_n} enshrined: ${z_anchor}"
  done
}

rbfd_ordain() {
  zrbfd_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Ordain a hallmark from a vessel (conjure, mirror, or graft based on vessel mode)"
  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel sigil or path to vessel directory"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  # Resolve vessel argument (sigil or path)
  zrbfc_resolve_vessel "${1:-}"
  local -r z_vessel_dir=$(<"${ZRBFC_VESSEL_RESOLVED_DIR_FILE}")
  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "Empty resolved vessel path"

  # Peek at vessel mode without sourcing (sourcing makes vars readonly,
  # and the downstream function will source again via zrbfc_load_vessel)
  local -r z_rbrv_file="${z_vessel_dir}/rbrv.env"
  local z_mode=""
  local z_mode_line=""
  while IFS= read -r z_mode_line || test -n "${z_mode_line}"; do
    case "${z_mode_line}" in
      RBRV_VESSEL_MODE=*) z_mode="${z_mode_line#RBRV_VESSEL_MODE=}"; break ;;
    esac
  done < "${z_rbrv_file}"
  z_mode="${z_mode:-conjure}"
  case "${z_mode}" in
    conjure) rbfd_build "${z_vessel_dir}" ;;
    bind)    rbfd_mirror "${z_vessel_dir}" ;;
    graft)   rbfd_graft "${z_vessel_dir}" ;;
    *)       buc_die "Unknown vessel mode: ${z_mode}" ;;
  esac

  # Chaining: read hallmark persisted by mode dispatch
  buc_step "Reading hallmark from mode dispatch output"
  local z_hallmark=""
  z_hallmark=$(<"${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${RBF_FACT_HALLMARK}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to read hallmark from output"
  test -n "${z_hallmark}" || buc_die "Empty hallmark in output"

  # Metadata pipeline: graft uses combined about+vouch; conjure/bind already have about, need standalone vouch
  case "${z_mode}" in
    conjure)
      buc_info "About produced by combined conjure job — proceeding to vouch"
      rbfv_vouch "${z_vessel_dir}" "${z_hallmark}"
      ;;
    graft)
      zrbfv_graft_metadata_submit "${z_vessel_dir}" "${z_hallmark}"
      ;;
    bind)
      buc_info "About produced by combined bind job — proceeding to vouch"
      rbfv_vouch "${z_vessel_dir}" "${z_hallmark}"
      ;;
    *)
      buc_die "Unknown vessel mode in chaining: ${z_mode}"
      ;;
  esac
}

  zrbfd_sentinel

1104	rbfd_build() {
1105	  zrbfd_sentinel
1106	
1107	  local -r z_vessel_dir="${1:-}"
1108	
1109	  # Documentation block
1110	  buc_doc_brief "Build container image from vessel via direct builds.create submission"
1111	  buc_doc_param "vessel_dir" "Path to vessel directory containing rbrv.env"
1112	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
1113	
1114	  buc_log_args "Validate parameters"
1115	  if test -z "${z_vessel_dir}"; then
1116	    local z_sigils
1117	    z_sigils=$(rbrv_list_capture) || buc_die "No vessels found"
1118	    buc_step "Available vessels:"
1119	    local z_sigil=""
1120	    for z_sigil in ${z_sigils}; do
1121	      buc_bare "        ${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}/${z_sigil}"
1122	    done
1123	    buc_die "Vessel directory required"
1124	  fi
1125	
1126	  # Load and validate vessel
1127	  zrbfc_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
1128	
1129	  buc_log_args "Verify vessel has conjuring configuration"
1130	  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE:-}" || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' is not configured for conjuring (no RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE)"
1131	  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT:-}" || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' is not configured for conjuring (no RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT)"
1132	
1133	  buc_log_args "Resolve paths from vessel configuration"
1134	  test -f "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}" || buc_die "Dockerfile not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}"
1135	  test -d "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}" || buc_die "Build context not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}"
1136	
1137	  buc_info "Building vessel image: ${RBRV_SIGIL}"
1138	
1139	  # Resolve tool images from reliquary (required for step image references)
1140	  zrbfc_resolve_tool_images
1141	
1142	  # Source Director RBRA for credentials
1143	  buc_step "Loading Director RBRA credentials"
1144	  source "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to source Director RBRA"
1145	
1146	  # Authenticate as Director
1147	  buc_step "Authenticating as Director"
1148	  local z_token=""
1149	  z_token=$(rbgo_get_token_capture "${RBDC_DIRECTOR_RBRA_FILE}") \
1150	    || buc_die "Failed to get Director OAuth token"
1151	
1152	  # Quota preflight -- warn if insufficient capacity
1153	  zrbfd_quota_preflight "${z_token}"
1154	
1155	  # Registry preflight -- verify reliquary and enshrined base images exist before expensive operations
1156	  zrbfd_registry_preflight "${z_token}" "${z_vessel_dir}"
1157	
1158	  # Capture git metadata (stitch needs ZRBFC_GIT_INFO_FILE)
1159	  buc_step "Capturing git metadata"
1160	  zrbfc_ensure_git_metadata
1161	  local z_git_commit=""
1162	  z_git_commit=$(<"${ZRBFC_GIT_COMMIT_FILE}")
1163	  local z_git_branch=""
1164	  z_git_branch=$(<"${ZRBFC_GIT_BRANCH_FILE}")
1165	  local z_git_repo=""
1166	  z_git_repo=$(<"${ZRBFC_GIT_REPO_FILE}")
1167	  jq -n \
1168	    --arg commit "${z_git_commit}" \
1169	    --arg branch "${z_git_branch}" \
1170	    --arg repo   "${z_git_repo}" \
1171	    '{"commit": $commit, "branch": $branch, "repo": $repo}' \
1172	    > "${ZRBFC_GIT_INFO_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to write git info JSON for stitch"
1173	  buc_info "Git: ${z_git_commit:0:8} on ${z_git_branch}"
1174	
1175	  # Mint hallmark on host — same pattern as bind/graft: inscribe + realized
1176	  buc_step "Minting hallmark on host"
1177	  local -r z_inscribe_ts="c${BURD_NOW_STAMP:2:6}${BURD_NOW_STAMP:9:6}"
1178	  local -r z_realized_ts_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfd_realized_ts.txt"
1179	  date -u +%y%m%d%H%M%S > "${z_realized_ts_file}" \
1180	    || buc_die "Failed to generate realized timestamp"
1181	  local -r z_realized_ts=$(<"${z_realized_ts_file}")
1182	  test -n "${z_realized_ts}" || buc_die "Empty realized timestamp"
1183	  local -r z_hallmark="${z_inscribe_ts}-r${z_realized_ts}"
1184	  buc_info "Host-minted hallmark: ${z_hallmark}"
1185

1187	  zrbfd_push_build_context "${z_token}" "${RBRV_SIGIL}" "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}" "${z_hallmark}"
1188	  local z_context_tag=""

1190	  test -n "${z_context_tag}" || buc_die "Empty context image tag after push"
1191	
1192	  # Stitch build JSON — generates complete builds.create resource directly
1193	  buc_step "Stitching build JSON"
1194	  local -r z_build_file="${ZRBFD_CONTEXT_PREFIX}build.json"
1195	  zrbfd_stitch_build_json "${z_build_file}" "${z_hallmark}" "${z_context_tag}"
1196	
1197	  # Submit via builds.create (no source — context delivered via GAR image)
1198	  buc_step "Submitting build via builds.create"
1199	  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${ZRBFC_GCB_PROJECT_BUILDS_URL}" "${z_token}" \
1200	    "build_direct_create" "${z_build_file}"
1201	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Direct build submission" "build_direct_create"
1202	
1203	  # Extract build ID from Operation response
1204	  local z_build_id=""
1205	  z_build_id=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "build_direct_create" '.metadata.build.id') || z_build_id=""
1206	  test -n "${z_build_id}" || buc_die "Build ID not found in builds.create response"
1207	  echo "${z_build_id}" > "${ZRBFC_BUILD_ID_FILE}" || buc_die "Failed to persist build ID"
1208	
1209	  local -r z_console_url="${ZRBFC_CLOUD_QUERY_BASE};region=${RBGD_GCB_REGION}/${z_build_id}?project=${RBGD_GCB_PROJECT_ID}"
1210	  buc_info "Build dispatched: ${z_build_id}"
1211	  buc_link "Click to " "Open build in Cloud Console" "${z_console_url}"
1212	
1213	  zrbfc_wait_build_completion 960 "Conjure"  # 80 minutes at 5s intervals
1214	
1215	  # Consistency assert: verify Cloud Build echoed back the same hallmark we minted
1216	  buc_step "Verifying hallmark consistency"
1217	
1218	  local z_step_output=""
1219	  jq -r '.results.buildStepOutputs[1] // empty' "${ZRBFC_BUILD_STATUS_FILE}" > "${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}" \
1220	    || buc_die "Failed to extract buildStepOutputs[1] from build response"
1221	  z_step_output=$(<"${ZRBFC_SCRATCH_FILE}")
1222	  if test -n "${z_step_output}"; then
1223	    local -r z_step_b64_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfd_step_b64.txt"
1224	    local -r z_step_decoded_file="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbfd_step_decoded.txt"
1225	    printf '%s\n' "${z_step_output}" > "${z_step_b64_file}" \
1226	      || buc_die "Failed to write step output for decoding"
1227	    openssl enc -base64 -d -A < "${z_step_b64_file}" > "${z_step_decoded_file}" \
1228	      || buc_die "Failed to base64-decode build step output"
1229	    local -r z_found_hallmark=$(<"${z_step_decoded_file}")
1230	    test "${z_found_hallmark}" = "${z_hallmark}" \
1231	      || buc_die "Hallmark mismatch: host minted '${z_hallmark}' but build returned '${z_found_hallmark}'"
1232	    buc_info "Hallmark consistency verified: ${z_hallmark}"
1233	  else
1234	    buc_warn "Build step output empty — skipping consistency check (hallmark trusted from host)"
1235	  fi
1236	
1237	  # Persist to output directory for test harness consumption
1238	  echo "${z_vessel_dir}" > "${ZRBFC_OUTPUT_VESSEL_DIR}" \
1239	    || buc_die "Failed to write vessel dir to output"
1240	  buf_write_fact_single "${RBF_FACT_HALLMARK}" "${z_hallmark}"
1241	
1242	  # Write GAR root fact file (registry prefix for composing full refs)
1243	  buf_write_fact_single "${RBF_FACT_GAR_ROOT}" "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_PATH}"
1244	
1245	  # Write ark stem fact file (hallmark subtree under HALLMARKS_ROOT)
1246	  buf_write_fact_single "${RBF_FACT_ARK_STEM}" "${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}"
1247	
1248	  # Write per-platform yield fact files (attest tags — durable provenance-carrying artifacts)
1249	  # Single attest package; per-platform tag = ${HALLMARK}-${arch}
1250	  local z_plat=""
1251	  local z_plat_suffix=""
1252	  local z_yield_ref=""
1253	  for z_plat in ${RBRV_CONJURE_PLATFORMS//,/ }; do
1254	    z_plat_suffix="${z_plat#linux/}"
1255	    z_plat_suffix="${z_plat_suffix//\//}"
1256	    z_yield_ref="${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST}:${z_hallmark}-${z_plat_suffix}"
1257	    buf_write_fact_single "${RBF_FACT_ARK_YIELD}-${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST}-${z_plat_suffix}" "${z_yield_ref}"
1258	    buc_info "Output: ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${RBF_FACT_ARK_YIELD}-${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST}-${z_plat_suffix}"
1259	  done
1260	
1261	  # Write build ID fact file (dispatched build ID for cross-check with vouch provenance)
1262	  buf_write_fact_single "${RBF_FACT_BUILD_ID}" "${z_build_id}"
1263	
1264	  buc_info "Output: ${ZRBFC_OUTPUT_VESSEL_DIR}"
1265	  buc_info "Output: ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${RBF_FACT_HALLMARK}"
1266	  buc_info "Output: ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${RBF_FACT_GAR_ROOT}"
1267	  buc_info "Output: ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${RBF_FACT_ARK_STEM}"
1268	  buc_info "Output: ${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${RBF_FACT_BUILD_ID}"
1269	
1270	  buc_success "Vessel image built: ${RBRV_SIGIL}"
1271	}
1272	
1273	######################################################################
1274	# Kludge Build - Local image build for development
1275	#
1276	# Builds a vessel image locally using docker build, tags it with a
1277	# kludge hallmark (k-prefixed timestamp) in the same GAR-style
1278	# format that compose and rbob_charge expect. Also creates a fake
1279	# vouch tag (same image, aliased) so the vouch gate passes.
1280	#
1281	# No Cloud Build, no GAR push, no credentials consumed.
1282	# Host platform only (no multi-arch).
1283	
1284	rbfd_kludge() {
1285	  zrbfd_sentinel
1286	
1287	  buc_doc_brief "Build vessel image locally for development (no Cloud Build, no GAR push)"
1288	  buc_doc_param "vessel" "Vessel sigil or path to vessel directory"
1289	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
1290	
1291	  # Dirty-tree guard — kludge images must correspond to a committed state
1292	  buc_step "Verifying clean working tree"
1293	  git diff --quiet \
1294	    || buc_die "Working tree has unstaged changes — commit before kludge"
1295	  git diff --cached --quiet \
1296	    || buc_die "Index has staged changes — commit before kludge"
1297	
1298	  # Resolve vessel argument (sigil or path)
1299	  zrbfc_resolve_vessel "${1:-}"
1300	  local -r z_vessel_dir=$(<"${ZRBFC_VESSEL_RESOLVED_DIR_FILE}")
1301	  test -n "${z_vessel_dir}" || buc_die "Empty resolved vessel path"
1302	
1303	  # Load vessel configuration
1304	  zrbfc_load_vessel "${z_vessel_dir}"
1305	
1306	  # Validate conjure mode (bind and graft don't have local Dockerfiles)
1307	  test "${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE}" = "conjure" \
1308	    || buc_die "Kludge only supports conjure vessels (got: ${RBRV_VESSEL_MODE})"
1309	  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE:-}" \
1310	    || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' has no RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE"
1311	  test -n "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT:-}" \
1312	    || buc_die "Vessel '${RBRV_SIGIL}' has no RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT"
1313	  test -f "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}" \
1314	    || buc_die "Dockerfile not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}"
1315	  test -d "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}" \
1316	    || buc_die "Build context not found: ${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}"
1317	
1318	  # Resolve base images (use ORIGIN directly — no GAR enshrine lookup for local builds)
1319	  local z_build_args=()
1320	  local z_slot="" z_origin_var="" z_origin=""
1321	  for z_slot in 1 2 3; do
1322	    z_origin_var="RBRV_IMAGE_${z_slot}_ORIGIN"
1323	    z_origin="${!z_origin_var:-}"
1324	    test -n "${z_origin}" || continue
1325	    z_build_args+=("--build-arg" "RBF_IMAGE_${z_slot}=${z_origin}")
1326	    buc_info "Image slot ${z_slot}: ${z_origin}"
1327	  done
1328	  test ${#z_build_args[@]} -gt 0 || buc_die "No RBRV_IMAGE_n_ORIGIN found in vessel config"
1329	
1330	  # Generate kludge hallmark (k prefix distinguishes from conjure c, bind b)
1331	  # Timestamp for chronological sorting, git describe for commit provenance
1332	  # BURD_GIT_CONTEXT is exported by bud_dispatch; dirty-tree guard above ensures clean tree
1333	  local -r z_hallmark="k${BURD_NOW_STAMP:2:6}${BURD_NOW_STAMP:9:6}-${BURD_GIT_CONTEXT}"
1334	
1335	  # Construct image refs matching compose/vouch-gate format (new layout — hallmark-as-tag).
1336	  local -r z_image_ref="${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_PATH}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE}:${z_hallmark}"
1337	  local -r z_vouch_ref="${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_PATH}/${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}/${RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH}:${z_hallmark}"
1338	
1339	  buc_step "Kludge build: ${RBRV_SIGIL}"
1340	  buc_info "Hallmark: ${z_hallmark}"
1341	  buc_info "Image tag: ${z_image_ref}"
1342	
1343	  # Build locally (host platform only — no multi-arch for dev builds)
1344	  buc_step "Building image locally"
1345	  docker build \
1346	    "${z_build_args[@]}" \
1347	    -f "${RBRV_CONJURE_DOCKERFILE}" \
1348	    -t "${z_image_ref}" \
1349	    "${RBRV_CONJURE_BLDCONTEXT}" \
1350	    || buc_die "Local build failed for ${RBRV_SIGIL}"
1351	
1352	  # Create fake vouch tag (same image, aliased — satisfies rbob_charge vouch gate)
1353	  buc_step "Creating vouch tag"
1354	  docker tag "${z_image_ref}" "${z_vouch_ref}" \
1355	    || buc_die "Failed to create vouch tag"
1356	
1357	  # Persist facts — mirror conjure/bind/graft so downstream consumers (theurge)
1358	  # can build full refs uniformly regardless of mode.
1359	  buf_write_fact_single "${RBF_FACT_HALLMARK}" "${z_hallmark}"
1360	  buf_write_fact_single "${RBF_FACT_GAR_ROOT}" "${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_HOST}/${ZRBFC_REGISTRY_PATH}"
1361	  buf_write_fact_single "${RBF_FACT_ARK_STEM}" "${RBGL_HALLMARKS_ROOT}/${z_hallmark}"
1362	
1363	  buc_success "Kludge build complete: ${RBRV_SIGIL}"
1364	  buc_bare ""
1365	  buc_bare "  Hallmark: ${z_hallmark}"
1366	  buc_bare "  Image:        ${z_image_ref}"
1367	  buc_bare "  Vouch:        ${z_vouch_ref}"
1368	  buc_bare ""
1369	  buc_bare "  Auto-install via: tt/rbw-tK.KludgeCycle.{moniker}.sh"
1370	}
1371	
1372	######################################################################
1373	# Mirror (bind vessel → GAR)
1374	
1375	rbfd_mirror() {
1376	  zrbfd_sentinel
1377	
1378	  local z_vessel_dir="${1:-}"
1379	
1380	  # Documentation block
1381	  buc_doc_brief "Mirror a bind vessel image from upstream to GAR via combined Cloud Build (skopeo copy + about)"
1382	  buc_doc_param "vessel_dir" "Path to vessel directory containing rbrv.env"
1383	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
